name: centro-terapias
description: Plataforma de gestión para centros de terapias infantiles (multi-tenant)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start:dev -w @centro/api" "npm run dev -w @centro/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @centro/shared && npm run build -w @centro/api && npm run build -w @centro/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @centro/api && npm run lint -w @centro/web
